text: All about universal human values as the nation character cornerstone so that society becomes just, peaceful and prosperous. In order to face the global and modern challenges Universal Human Values have to be introduced since early childhood. Therefore Pancasila Education as a specific subject for school students have to play significant role in doing so. Many universal human values are also reflected in the Hindu philosophy in great details, so that they can be developed as the resource to support learning Pancasila Education at school. It is believed that developing Hindu philosophical values in Pancasila Education will highly benefit the next generations of Indonesians. They will grow into persons with moral values, personality and whom always respect Universal Human Values. This is naturally confronted with the obstacle and challenges. However there are more pros than cons in integrating values from Hindu philosophy into Pancasila Education for the next generation of Indonesian youth and hence for the future of Indonesia.
